   4	class DataPreprocessor:
   5	    def __init__(self, schema: Dict[str, str]):
   6	        """schema maps column name to expected dtype like 'float64', 'int64', 'object'"""

   8	
   9	    def transform(self, df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
  10	        for col, dtype in self.schema.items():
  11	            if col in df.columns:
  12	                df[col] = df[col].astype(dtype)
  13	        return df
  14	
  15	    def drop_nulls(self, df: pd.DataFrame, columns: Optional[List[str]] = None) -> pd.DataFrame:
  16	        if columns:
  17	            return df.dropna(subset=columns)
  18	        return df.dropna()
